prestazioni: 1UR-FSE 4.6L V8 (347hp stock) forced induction via HKS GT-SS Supercharger Kit (850cc injectors, 6psi base boost, intercooled) paired with a Tomei 272°/276° camshaft upgrade for optimized airflow and mid-range torque retention

Full 3.5-inch stainless steel exhaust system by Fujitsubo Legalis R (cat-back, 70mm piping, resonated center section) with a custom 4-2-1 header setup by Jun Auto for improved scavenging and 15-20whp gain over stock manifolds

KW Suspension Clubsport coilovers (3-way adjustable, 8kg/mm front/10kg/mm rear springs) with polyurethane bushings (SuperPro 685) and Cusco front strut tower bar (22mm hollow section) for chassis rigidity and track-focused alignment (-2.5° front camber, -1.8° rear)
estetica: Vertex Lang II widebody conversion kit (25mm front/30mm rear fender flares, carbon fiber front splitter, and rear diffuser) with custom matte gunmetal paint (PPG DBC 9700) and clear bra (XPEL Ultimate) on high-impact zones
Seibon Carbon fiber hood (Type-35, 50% weight reduction) with integrated NACA ducts for brake cooling, paired with a Varis Japan rear spoiler (20mm adjustable angle, 3K twill carbon)

Work Emotion CR Kiwami wheels (19x9.5 +22 front, 19x10.5 +30 rear) in gloss black with Toyo R888R tires (255/35/19 front, 285/30/19 rear) and Project Mu 8-piston front/4-piston rear brake calipers (356mm rotors) with stainless steel lines
